text.content: This option really gets us deep into the Southern Cedeberg. The first day takes us South via the Maltese cross into the next valley and a summit of Apollo Peak. We will drop bags at the bottom, and come back down to camp near Disa Pools.

rich_text.plain_text: This option really gets us deep into the Southern Cedeberg. The first day takes us South via the Maltese cross into the next valley and a summit of Apollo Peak. We will drop bags at the bottom, and come back down to camp near Disa Pools.

text.content: The second day will be the biggest, and also allows for people to summit Sneeuberg (without a pack) if they are keen. That will split the group up, but Duiwelsgat is beautiful and straight - and we’re all ending at Algeria, so it would be a safe place to split up. The stronger runners will be at the back which is also better. This is a must do run - it’s a crazy beautiful area.

rich_text.plain_text: The second day will be the biggest, and also allows for people to summit Sneeuberg (without a pack) if they are keen. That will split the group up, but Duiwelsgat is beautiful and straight - and we’re all ending at Algeria, so it would be a safe place to split up. The stronger runners will be at the back which is also better. This is a must do run - it’s a crazy beautiful area.

text.content: Third day is just a blissful contour climb up that beautiful valley NW of Algeria up to Middleberg hut. Then up to Cyrstal pools for the last night - it’s just such a perfect campsite. It may be busy but there is always space.

rich_text.plain_text: Third day is just a blissful contour climb up that beautiful valley NW of Algeria up to Middleberg hut. Then up to Cyrstal pools for the last night - it’s just such a perfect campsite. It may be busy but there is always space.

text.content: The last day is a direct route back to Algeria. With the option of either the waterfall or cascade pools.

rich_text.plain_text: The last day is a direct route back to Algeria. With the option of either the waterfall or cascade pools.

text.content: Cool runners: A shorter route has been planned to start at Cederberg park and end at Disa pools:

text.content: Up to Crystal pools and camp there

rich_text.plain_text: Up to Crystal pools and camp there

text.content: Down Die Gat and past Cascade pools back to Algeria

rich_text.plain_text: Down Die Gat and past Cascade pools back to Algeria

text.content: Alternatively - could go via Middleberg hut and the waterfall (it’s roughly the same distance)
